//: Recommended restrictive settings for the Listo plugin. Defense-in-depth only — the real boundary is server-side (Amazon creds + live writes never leave the Listo cloud). Replaces any blanket Bash allow from the engine snapshot.
//env: Static fallback for direct Bash python (the SessionStart hook is the primary, project-scoped path). LISTO_GATEWAY + the shim dir on PYTHONPATH activate sitecustomize.py; harmless in non-engine sessions because gateway_redirect.activate() no-ops when core.amazon_api isn't importable.
